items.name: 千古園
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Senkoen. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

items.name: 火薬庫
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a powder magazine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Nopporo Dadai kagura dance. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a framed tablet inscribed "Tsuigan Gakko" (Tsuigan School). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

en.name_romaji: Hengaku "Fūki wa Kugaku Rōryoku ni Ari"
en.name_en: Framed Tablet "Wealth Lies in Diligent Study and Toil"
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a framed tablet inscribed with the motto "Wealth lies in diligent study and toil." It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

items.name: 坊主山遺跡出土江別式土器

en.name_en: Ebetsu-Type Pottery Excavated from the Bozuyama Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of Ebetsu-type pottery excavated from the Bozuyama site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Okada warehouse. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
